title: Diamond Materializerer
description: Breaks the game's economy by giving you DIAMOOOONDS! early. Crafted from 3 birch planks, 1 birch log, and 1 stick.
body:
This mod makes Diamonds harder to get, now requiring BIRCH to obtain! Oh noes!
I guess you have to sacrifice yourself to the birch gods to get unlimited diamonds, or go mine for some.

The Diamond Materializerer is crafted from 3 birch planks, 1 birch log, and 1 stick, shapeless.
